subject: Friday Budget Review Meeting
body:
Hi, for the budget review meeting on Friday at 2 PM, please have Manager Zhang join us. We need to discuss the Q2 departmental budget allocation.

Please notify Manager Zhang.

Ming Li

subject: New Employee Onboarding Arrangements
body:
Hello, two new employees are joining next Monday. Please arrange workstations and equipment.

Also, the onboarding training schedule needs to be confirmed with Manager Zhang. The technical training portion on his end hasn't been finalized yet.

Fang Wang
